rulings.Case Title: MACOR INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, DECEMBER 14, 2007, LINE 16. PLAINTIFFS MACOR, INC., CORNERSTONE PROPERTIES II S, L.L.C., WALDEN MISSION BAY I, L.L.C.'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint IS GRANTED. ANY DELAY HAS NOT BEEN UNREASONABLE. ANY PREJUDICE CAN BE AVERTED BY GRANTING DEFENDANTS A REASONABLE PERIOD OF TIME TO AMEND THEIR MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT TO BE SET BY STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES OR THE COURT IF THE PARTIES CANNOT AGREE. BASED ON HENRY COWELL LIME & CEMENT CO. V STATE (1941) 18 CAL 2D 169, 172, PLAINTIFF HAS PROVIDED A SUFFICIENT SHOWING TO ALLOW THE AMENDMENT. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: BRUGNARA PROPERTIES I,L.P. A CALIFORNIA LIMITED et al VS. CMR MORTGAGE FUND II, LLC, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Enjoin Defts' Pending Nonjudicial Foreclosures
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, DECEMBER 14, 2007, LINE 21. PLAINTIFFS BRUGNARA PROPERTIES I, L.P., BRUGNARA CORPORATION, BRUGNARA PROPERTIES, VI'S Motion To Enjoin Defendants' Pending Nonjudicial Foreclosures: HEARING REQUIRED. IT APPEARS THAT NOTICE OF SALE HAS BEEN GIVEN. IT IS UNDISPUTED THAT PLAINTIFF IS IN DEFAULT AND THAT DEFENDANT HAS A SECURED INTEREST. ALTHOUGH THERE MAY BE AN AMOUNT IN DISPUTE, THAT IS A SMALL PORTION OF THE DEBT. PLAINTIFF CLAIMS IT CANNOT AFFORD A BOND AND HAS NOT TENDERED THE AMOUNT DUE. IT APPEARS THE EQUITIES FAVOR ALLOWING THE SALE TO PROCEED AND DIRECTING THAT THE SUMS IN DISPUTE BE PLACED WITH THE COURT PENDING A DETERMINATION OF THAT ISSUE. =(302/PJM/PB)
